hash.already_folded_u: This scalar is already emitted as folded style by the author; the pass leaves it untouched even though the wrap boundaries may not be optimal.
hash.at_line_width_u: aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aaaaaaaaaa aa
hash.basic_long_u: This is a very long single-line description that clearly exceeds the line width and should be broken into multiple lines to improve readability of the YAML file.
hash.interior_colon_u: This: is a long description containing a colon that continues past the line width to force the fold logic to kick in
hash.interior_double_space_d: null This is a long description that includes a hello  world double-space region which must survive intact across every wrap of the folded scalar output.
hash.interior_double_space_u: This is a long description that includes a hello  world double-space region which must survive intact across every wrap of the folded scalar output.
hash.interior_tab_u: This is a long description that contains a literal	tab character in the middle and continues past the line width to trigger the fold.
hash.leading_dash_d: null - but I really wanted to start with a dash and the sentence goes on and on and on and on past the line width so folding is triggered
hash.leading_dash_u: - but I really wanted to start with a dash and the sentence goes on and on and on and on past the line width so folding is triggered
hash.leading_whitespace_u: three leading spaces then the description continues on and on past the line width to force the fold logic to check the guard rail.
